_doc: Customer chat dialogues for cafe shifts. Each entry has tags that map to recipe tags for recommendation matching. Correct answers generate an additional order for the customer.

dialogues.customer_line: Hey, sorry -- I'm lactose intolerant. Do you have drinks without milk?

choices.text: Yes we do! We've got lemonade, teas without milk, and our house blend with no added cream.
choices.response: Oh nice! I'll take a tea then.

choices.text: Hmm... I think most of our drinks have milk.

dialogues.customer_line: I can't really have caffeine... anything gentle?

choices.text: Of course! We have herbal teas and fruit drinks that are completely caffeine-free.
You could try a small coffee?

dialogues.customer_line: I'd love a dessert, but dairy doesn't agree with me. Anything safe?

choices.text: Absolutely! Our honey cookie and blueberry muffin are dairy-free and delicious.
choices.response: Ooh, a honey cookie sounds great!

choices.text: All our desserts have butter or cream, sorry.

dialogues.customer_line: My doctor says no caffeine, but I still want something sweet to drink...

choices.text: How about a strawberry milk or hot chocolate? Sweet and caffeine-free!
Sweet drinks usually have caffeine in them.
choices.response: That... doesn't sound right. I'll just go.

dialogues.customer_line: It's my first time here... what do you recommend?

choices.text: Welcome! How about something refreshing? Our iced tea and fruit drinks are really popular.
Everything's good, just pick something.

dialogues.customer_line: I have the biggest sweet tooth. What's the sweetest thing you've got?

choices.text: You're in the right place! Our caramel mocha and honey pancakes are heavenly sweet.
choices.response: Say no more -- I'll try one!

choices.text: We don't really do super sweet stuff.

dialogues.customer_line: I need something strong. Like, wake-me-up strong.

choices.text: Our house blend is bold and no-nonsense. Cinnamon coffee too if you like a kick!
choices.response: Bold and no-nonsense -- that's me. I'll take it.

choices.text: Maybe try a smoothie?

dialogues.customer_line: It's so hot outside... do you have anything cold?

choices.text: Totally! We've got iced tea, smoothies, milkshakes, and lemon sorbet to cool you down.
We mostly serve hot drinks.
choices.response: In this weather? I'll try somewhere else.

dialogues.customer_line: Brr, it's freezing today. Something warm would be amazing...

choices.text: I've got just the thing! Hot chocolate, chai latte, or a nice warm soup?
We have iced drinks on special today.
choices.response: ...that's the opposite of what I need.

dialogues.customer_line: I love anything with cinnamon or spice. Got anything like that?

choices.text: You'd love our cinnamon coffee, chai latte, or apple cider -- all warm and spicy!
choices.response: Oh, all of those sound amazing!

choices.text: We don't really use spices here.

dialogues.customer_line: I had a long day... I just want something comforting.

choices.text: I get that. Something warm and sweet like a cinnamon roll or hot chocolate could really help.
Uh... we have desserts.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm having a really rough week. What would you pick to cheer someone up?

choices.text: When I'm down, a warm cream cocoa or a slice of chocolate cake always helps. Want to try?
choices.response: You know what... yes. I deserve that.

choices.text: I don't know, food doesn't fix problems.

dialogues.customer_line: I've got exams tomorrow and I'm so stressed... anything calming?

choices.text: Our lemon honey tea is really soothing, and it's caffeine-free so it won't keep you wired.
choices.response: That's exactly what I need. Thank you.

choices.text: Triple espresso?
choices.response: I said calming, not heart attack...

dialogues.customer_line: The baby kept me up all night... I can barely keep my eyes open.

choices.text: Hang in there! A strong house blend or cinnamon coffee should help wake you up.
Maybe some warm milk?
choices.response: That'll put me right back to sleep...

dialogues.customer_line: I just got a promotion! I want to treat myself to something special.

choices.text: Congratulations! How about a rich caramel mocha or a slice of our chocolate cake to celebrate?
choices.response: Yes! Something indulgent! I earned it!

choices.text: Water is free.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm not super hungry... just something light?

choices.text: No problem! A rice ball, fruit salad, or veggie wrap would be nice and light.
You should get a full meal, you look thin.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm in a bit of a rush -- what's quick?

choices.text: Got you! A rice ball, toast, or cherry soda -- all ready in a flash.
Everything takes time, you'll have to wait.
choices.response: I really don't have time for this.

dialogues.customer_line: I skipped lunch and I'm starving. What's the most filling thing you've got?

choices.text: Our grilled cheese, egg sandwich, or soups are really hearty and filling!
Try a cookie, that should hold you over.
choices.response: A cookie? I said starving, not snacky.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm on break and I only have ten minutes. Anything fast and tasty?

choices.text: A honey cookie or blueberry muffin -- quick, sweet, and satisfying!
Our cakes are nice but take a while to plate.
choices.response: I don't have time for that...

dialogues.customer_line: Just finished a run and I need something cold and refreshing!

choices.text: Nice! How about a banana shake for energy, or a strawberry lemonade to cool down?
Hot soup would warm you right up after a run.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm meeting someone special here tonight. What's the most romantic thing on the menu?

choices.text: How about a chocolate tart or a cream cocoa for two? Rich and cozy.
This is a cafe, not a restaurant.
choices.response: Well, that's... not the vibe I was hoping for.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm not in the mood for sweet stuff. Got anything savory?

choices.text: Definitely! We have grilled cheese, egg sandwiches, and a great tomato soup.
choices.response: Oh, savory options! Sign me up.

choices.text: This is mostly a dessert cafe.

dialogues.customer_line: I'm trying to eat healthier. Any suggestions?

choices.text: Our fruit salad is fresh and light, and the veggie wrap is really crisp and tasty!
This is a cafe, not a gym.

dialogues.customer_line: I heard you have something... magical on the menu? Is that real?

choices.text: It is! Our Moonlight Cocoa shimmers and the Dreamer's Tea fills the room with calm. Want to try?
choices.response: Whoa, yes! I have to see this.

choices.text: That's just marketing, it's regular food.

dialogues.customer_line: I need energy for the rest of the day. What gives you a boost?

choices.text: A banana shake for quick energy, or a house blend for a caffeine boost!
You should probably just take a nap.
